backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining diagram state types (icons, connections, drawings, lines, text labels), user profiles, and CRUD operations for diagrams with authorization checks using mixins for storage and access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of the user icon with a single person icon in the attack path template, referencing AttackPathIcon.tsx and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for the threat hunting portal with attack path visualization and report management features.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme CSS variables for a security-focused design palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Threat Hunting Portal application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/index.ts: Example code snippet demonstrating html2canvas usage for exporting canvas elements to PNG images.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal, and route protection requiring login for all pages.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component managing icon placement with resize/transform, connections with rotation, drawing modes (freehand/line/arrow), text labels with multi-line input, and element selection/deletion with drag-and-drop support.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: SVG-based arrow connector component rendering lines between icons with rotation support, arrowheads, selection highlighting, and click handling for arrow manipulation.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Renders draggable icons for attack path diagrams, mapping IconType strings to image assets and handling drag-and-drop events.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a sidebar toolbar with draggable attack path icons, drawing tool buttons (freehand, line, arrow, text, eraser, move), text formatting controls, and diagram management actions (save, load, clear, undo).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation (Reports, Attack Path, New Report), user profile display, login button, hero banner on homepage, and footer with Caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams, displaying a scrollable list with metadata (icon count, connections, last modified) and delete functionality with confirmation.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Logout button component that clears Internet Identity authentication and React Query cache when clicked.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with Internet Identity authentication, displaying security messaging and a login button for accessing the threat hunt portal.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: Searchable combobox for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, with support for adding custom techniques and displaying selected items as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: Button component that triggers PDF generation for a report using the pdfGenerator utility, showing loading state and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, using a non-dismissible dialog that saves via useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, remediation actions, and recommendations.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: Dialog component for saving attack path diagrams with a name input field, handling save/cancel actions and displaying loading state.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Static data file containing MITRE ATT&CK technique definitions organized by tactics (Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, Privilege Escalation) with IDs, names, and descriptions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: Custom hook managing state for attack path diagrams including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, drawing tools, history/undo functionality, and element selection/manipulation.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteDiagramState: React Query mutation hook for deleting diagram states by ID, invalidating the allDiagrams query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all saved diagrams from the backend actor, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend, with custom loading state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram state by ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (getAllReports, getReport, saveReport, deleteReport) but all methods are disabled/stubbed since backend no longer supports this functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving the current user's profile to the backend canister, invalidating the currentUserProfile query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook for persisting diagram state (attack path diagrams) to the backend, invalidating related query caches on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page for creating and editing attack path diagrams with toolbar controls, canvas for placing icons/connections/drawings, and save/load/clear functionality using custom state management hooks.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component for creating new threat hunt reports with a form interface, using the useSaveReport hook (currently non-functional) to persist report data.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a single threat hunt report including executive summary, timeline, attack vectors, evidence, affected systems, and MITRE ATT&CK techniques with PDF export capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of threat hunting reports with metadata, MITRE techniques count, IOCs count, and actions (view, download PDF, delete). Includes loading states, error handling, and empty state with a create report prompt.
frontend/src/types/html2canvas.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for html2canvas library type definitions.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jspdf library type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable HTML document for threat hunt reports, opening it in a new window with styled sections for metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and analysis content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup capabilities.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar colors, custom animations, font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
frontend/vite.config.ts: Vite configuration for React app with path aliases, environment variable injection for canister IDs, proxy setup for local API calls, and build optimizations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a feature request to replace the user icon in the attack path template with a simple single-person silhouette icon as a visual-only element.
